calculators.subtitle: Free, fast, and accurate calculators designed specifically for Bangladesh tax compliance.
calculators.vatDesc: Calculate VAT (forward & backward) instantly. Includes standard and reduced rates.
calculators.incomeTaxDesc: Quickly estimate your individual or basic business income tax liability.
calculators.importDutyDesc: Estimate import duties and landing costs based on product types.

checklist.subtitle: Never miss a deadline. Keep track of your monthly and annual tax obligations.
